creator: nwhitehorn@FreeBSD.org
text: Kamailio seg faults periodically when built against OpenSSL 1.1 (https://github.com/kamailio/kamailio/issues/1860) and TLS is enabled. To avoid this on FreeBSD 12 and up, it should probably be built against OpenSSL 1.0 from ports until the underlying bug is fixed (this is the recommendation in the GitHub bug above).
